summary: Frontend testing of True Joy Birthing brand styling. Verified all screens render correctly with brand typography (Playfair Display headings, Quicksand body text) and color palette (lavender, dusty rose, sage green). All MOM, DOULA, and MIDWIFE screens display correctly with proper role-based color themes.

integration_issues.flow: Tab navigation in React Native Web
integration_issues.issue: Tab bar clicks don't navigate via Playwright automation - known React Native Web limitation from iteration 8/9
integration_issues.workaround: Direct URL navigation works, login button click works with data-testid='login-submit-btn'

issues: Title and label styles use fontWeight: '700'/'600' instead of fontFamily: FONTS.heading/FONTS.bodyBold - minor inconsistency with other screens that use FONTS constants

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update login.tsx and signup.tsx to use FONTS.heading for title styles instead of fontWeight: '700' for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: Brand fonts (Playfair Display, Quicksand) properly applied across MOM, DOULA, MIDWIFE screens via FONTS constants
Role-based colors correctly applied: MOM uses dusty rose, DOULA uses lavender, MIDWIFE uses sage green
login.tsx and signup.tsx could benefit from using FONTS constants for full consistency (currently using fontWeight instead of fontFamily)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand styling is fully applied across the app. Font family Quicksand_700Bold confirmed in rendered HTML. Tab navigation via Playwright doesn't work due to React Native Web limitations - use direct URL navigation or data-testid clicks instead.
